items.headline: Mats Zuccarello Yakov Trenin injury status for Minnesota for Game 5
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Mats Zuccarello and Yakov Trenin are game-time decisions for the Minnesota Wild in Game 5 of the Western Conference First Round at the Dallas Stars on Tuesday (8 p.m. ET; FDSNWI, FDSNNO, Victory+, ESPN2, TVAS2, SN360), coach John Hynes said.

items.headline: John Garrett Sportsnet analyst former NHL goalie dies at 74
items.description:
The hockey world was crushed Tuesday by news of the death of John Garrett, a former goalie and beloved Rogers Sportsnet and Hockey Night in Canada broadcaster. He was 74.

items.headline: Ted Lindsay Award finalists for most outstanding player for 2025-26 announced by NHLPA
items.description:
Macklin Celebrini, Nikita Kucherov and Connor McDavid were named finalists for the Ted Lindsay Award on Tuesday.
The award is given annually to the most outstanding player in the NHL as voted by fellow members of the NHL Players' Association.
The winner will be announced at a later date.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats starting goalie decisions 2026 playoffs
items.description: NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Today, we identify the underlying metrics behind three key goalie decisions in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

items.headline: NHL erases $1.25 million debt for U.S. veterans
items.description:
NEW YORK – The National Hockey League (NHL) today announced, in partnership with ForgiveCo, it is erasing $1.25 million of debt for U.S. veterans, aiding 1,025 veterans and their families.
Tonight, Dallas Stars forward Jason Robertson will host Specialist Cesar Gonzalez and his family at Game 5 of the 2026

items.headline: Commission Bettman statement on passing of John Garrett
items.description:
NEW YORK -- National Hockey League Commissioner Gary Bettman today released the following statement regarding the passing of John Garrett:

items.headline: Golden Knights earn gutsy Game 4 OT win against Utah Mammoth
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Shea Theodore walked down the hall, put his stick in the rack and shouted, “Let’s go home!” The defenseman turned right into the Vegas Golden Knights locker room, where his teammates were waiting to celebrate.

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights Utah Mammoth game 4 recap April 27 2026
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Shea Theodore scored at 19:08 of overtime to give the Vegas Golden Knights a 5-4 win against the Utah Mammoth in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Delta Center on Monday.

items.headline: Kris Letang fuels Penguins with crazy goal in Game 5 win
items.description:
